name: Smart Classroom
description: Ruang kelas modern dengan smart board, AC, dan akses internet berkecepatan tinggi.
descriptionEn: Modern classrooms with smart boards, AC, and high-speed internet access.

name: Laboratorium
description: Lab sains, komputer, dan bahasa yang dilengkapi peralatan mutakhir untuk praktikum.
descriptionEn: Science, computer, and language labs equipped with cutting-edge equipment for practicum.

name: Perpustakaan Digital
description: Perpustakaan dengan koleksi buku fisik dan digital, zona baca nyaman, dan akses jurnal internasional.
descriptionEn: Library with physical and digital book collections, comfortable reading zones, and international journal access.

name: Fasilitas Olahraga
description: Lapangan basket, futsal, kolam renang, dan gymnasium untuk pengembangan fisik siswa.
descriptionEn: Basketball court, futsal field, swimming pool, and gymnasium for student physical development.

name: Studio Seni & Budaya
description: Studio tari, musik, dan seni rupa untuk mengembangkan kreativitas dan apresiasi budaya.
descriptionEn: Dance, music, and fine arts studios to develop creativity and cultural appreciation.

name: Kantin Sehat
description: Kantin dengan pilihan makanan sehat, bergizi, dan higienis yang mendukung gaya hidup sehat.
descriptionEn: Canteen with healthy, nutritious, and hygienic food choices supporting a healthy lifestyle.
